meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush debugging bottlenecks. A student-focused guide using Antigravity to accelerate your development workflow and projects.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, integrate Claude Code into your terminal to automate root-cause analysis. By leveraging Antigravity to structure your codebase, you transform static files into an interactive diagnostic environment. This setup allows you to identify logic errors instantly, turning hours of frustrating debugging into minutes of streamlined, educational refinement.
content.intro:
You are staring at a terminal overflowing with cryptic stack traces, the cursor blinking like a countdown clock on your project’s success. The code you wrote yesterday, which seemed brilliant, is now a labyrinth of silent failures. We have all been there—the moment where your ambition hits the wall of technical complexity.

But here is the secret: senior engineers don’t just write code; they orchestrate tools to debug it for them. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop being a programmer who fights the machine and start being an architect who commands it. This guide is your bridge to becoming the developer who ships features while others are still stuck in the logs.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Prepare your directory to be readable by AI agents by cleaning up non-essential files and structuring your documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and generate a comprehensive context file that identifies potential architectural bottlenecks.

steps.title: Automated Bug Reproduction
steps.description: Use Claude Code to isolate the failure point by generating a minimal reproduction script.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test harness that isolates the logic error in the current module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'reproduce the current crash in a isolated test script'

steps.title: Root Cause Deep-Dive
steps.description: Leverage the LLM's analytical power to traverse your stack trace and identify the exact line of failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a causal analysis on the stack trace, identifying the state mutation that triggered this exception.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'analyze the last three stack traces and suggest a fix for the state management issue'

steps.title: Iterative Patching
steps.description: Apply targeted fixes while ensuring that your broader application logic remains intact.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a refactor plan for the identified function that improves error handling without introducing regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --plan 'refactor error handling in module.js'

steps.title: Verification and Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix works and doesn't break existing features by running automated validation suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests based on the new logic to prevent future regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test --verify 'all unit tests must pass after the patch'

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's 'read-only' mode when exploring legacy codebases to prevent accidental mass refactoring during your initial discovery phase.
Always define a .clauderc file in your root to standardize your coding style preferences across different student projects.
When debugging, ask the agent to 'explain the mental model of this function' to bridge the gap between code and conceptual understanding.
Combine Antigravity's dependency mapping with Claude's 'search' command to find hidden connections between disparate services.
Treat your debug logs as data points; feed them into the agent as JSON strings to help it identify recurring patterns over time.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is stable, begin integrating a CI/CD pipeline to automate these Claude Code checks every time you push code to your repository.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by top-tier developers to maintain high-velocity output. Stop fighting bugs and start building the future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
